nodes.label: New server setup checklist
nodes.source_location: ## Новий сервер з нуля — порядок дій
nodes.rationale: One-time instructions for a new server or instance migration; daily ops live in RUNBOOK.md instead.

nodes.label: Docker + compose service enabled
nodes.rationale: Without systemctl enable, restart: unless-stopped won't fire after reboot.

nodes.label: Clone repo to ~/tg-bot-sho-poisty
nodes.rationale: Compose derives project/container name (tg-bot-sho-poisty-bot-1) from directory name; a different directory silently breaks watcher monitoring with no errors.

nodes.label: Restore database before first start (step 4)
nodes.rationale: Updated: recommends stopping the old bot (docker compose down, which checkpoints WAL) and scp-ing data/bot.db directly; without this, first `up -d` creates an empty DB with no recipes.

nodes.label: docker compose down on old server (WAL checkpoint)
nodes.rationale: docker compose down correctly checkpoints the SQLite WAL before the file is copied.
nodes.norm_label: docker compose down on old server (wal checkpoint)

nodes.label: Restore from R2 nightly backup (fallback)
nodes.rationale: Used when the old server is already gone; points to ~/backup-script and its README.md.

nodes.label: ntfy-bot-watch.service
nodes.rationale: Listens to docker events for crash/OOM/stop/up notifications.

nodes.label: ntfy-heartbeat-check.timer
nodes.rationale: Runs every 3 min; restarts container itself if heartbeat is stale.

nodes.label: docker-image-prune.timer
nodes.rationale: Removes only dangling images from --build rebuilds, weekly.

nodes.label: NTFY_TOPIC secret topic
nodes.rationale: Topic name doubles as a password, so it must be unguessable and kept out of git.

nodes.label: SSH deploy secrets (4)
nodes.rationale: SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, SSH_USER, SSH_HOST, SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS must be re-linked when moving to a new server.

nodes.label: ADMIN_USER_IDS
nodes.rationale: Admins see the 📊 Статистика button in the main menu; admin must also be in ALLOWED_USER_IDS.

nodes.label: 📊 Статистика admin button
nodes.rationale: Unchanged from earlier graph state; shows users and OpenRouter balance to admins.

nodes.label: ALLOWED_USER_IDS access control
nodes.rationale: Empty = nobody allowed (safe default); '*' opens the bot to all of Telegram.

nodes.label: ## Бекап section
nodes.rationale: New section describing the automatic nightly backup mechanism.

nodes.label: ~/backup-script/backup.sh
nodes.rationale: Lives outside this git repo, shared across multiple bots on the host.

nodes.label: projects.d/*.conf per-project config
nodes.rationale: Lets one shared backup script back up data/, .env, .env.keys per project on the host.

nodes.label: WAL-safe SQLite checkpoint before packing
nodes.rationale: Ensures the packed backup is a consistent SQLite snapshot despite WAL mode.

nodes.label: healthchecks.io dead-man switch
nodes.rationale: Detects a missed backup run, not just a failed one.

nodes.label: Heartbeat + auto-restart against hangs
nodes.rationale: 30-min cooldown between auto-restarts deliberately avoids masking a systemic problem with a restart loop.

nodes.label: Бойова перевірка авторестарту (fire drill)
nodes.rationale: Must freeze the process from the host by PID; docker exec kill -STOP on PID 1 and docker pause don't work.

nodes.label: Other containers on host (tg-news-filter, my-tg-bot)
nodes.rationale: Must not run docker system prune -a; it would remove their images too.

links.source_location: FSM state must be scoped by group_id
unlimited json-file logs would fill the 45 GB disk
aiogram long polling shutdown exceeds default 10s; SIGKILL causes false BOT DOWN alert
